root_text.an5.249:1.3: Asuci, duggandhā, sappaṭibhayā, vāḷānaṁ amanussānaṁ āvāso, bahuno janassa ārodanā—
root_text.an5.249:1.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ādīnavā sivathikāya.
root_text.an5.249:2.1: Evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, pañcime ādīnavā sivathikūpame puggale.
root_text.an5.249:2.3: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo asucinā kāyakammena samannāgato hoti;
root_text.an5.249:3.1: Tassa asucinā kāyakammena samannāgatassa, asucinā vacīkammena samannāgatassa, asucinā manokammena samannāgatassa pāpako kittisaddo abbhuggacchati.
root_text.an5.249:4.1: Tamenaṁ asucinā kāyakammena samannāgataṁ, asucinā vacīkammena samannāgataṁ, asucinā manokammena samannāgataṁ pesalā sabrahmacārī ārakā parivajjanti.
root_text.an5.249:5.1: So asucinā kāyakammena samannāgato, asucinā vacīkammena samannāgato, asucinā manokammena samannāgato sabhāgehi puggalehi saddhiṁ saṁvasati.
root_text.an5.249:5.3: Seyyathāpi sā, bhikkhave, sivathikā vāḷānaṁ amanussānaṁ āvāso;
root_text.an5.249:6.1: Tamenaṁ asucinā kāyakammena samannāgataṁ, asucinā vacīkammena samannāgataṁ, asucinā manokammena samannāgataṁ pesalā sabrahmacārī disvā khīyadhammaṁ āpajjanti:
root_text.an5.249:6.2: ‘aho vata no dukkhaṁ ye mayaṁ evarūpehi puggalehi saddhiṁ saṁvasāmā’ti.
root_text.an5.249:6.4: Seyyathāpi sā, bhikkhave, sivathikā bahuno janassa ārodanā;
root_text.an5.249:6.6: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ādīnavā sivathikūpame puggale”ti.

translation_text.an5.249:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five drawbacks to a charnel ground.
translation_text.an5.249:1.3: It’s filthy, stinking, frightening, a gathering place for savage monsters, and a weeping place for many people.
translation_text.an5.249:1.4: These are the five drawbacks of a charnel ground.
translation_text.an5.249:2.1: In the same way there are five drawbacks of an individual like a charnel ground.
translation_text.an5.249:2.3: To start with, an individual has filthy conduct by way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an5.249:2.6: This is how they’re filthy, I say.
translation_text.an5.249:2.7: That individual is just as filthy as a charnel ground.
translation_text.an5.249:3.1: Because of their filthy conduct, they get a bad reputation.
translation_text.an5.249:3.2: This is how they’re stinky, I say.
translation_text.an5.249:3.3: That individual is just as stinky as a charnel ground.
translation_text.an5.249:4.1: Because of their filthy conduct, good-hearted spiritual companions avoid them from afar.
translation_text.an5.249:4.2: That’s how they’re frightening, I say.
translation_text.an5.249:4.3: That individual is just as frightening as a charnel ground.
translation_text.an5.249:5.1: Because of their filthy conduct, they live together with individuals of a similar character.
translation_text.an5.249:5.2: This is how they gather with savage monsters, I say.
translation_text.an5.249:5.3: That individual is just as much a gathering place of savage monsters as a charnel ground.
translation_text.an5.249:6.1: Because of their filthy conduct, when good-hearted spiritual companions see them they complain:
translation_text.an5.249:6.2: ‘Oh, it’s so painful for us to have to live together with such as these.’
translation_text.an5.249:6.3: This is how there’s weeping, I say.
translation_text.an5.249:6.4: This person is just as much a weeping place for many people as a charnel ground.
translation_text.an5.249:6.6: These are the five drawbacks of an individual like a charnel ground.”
